# default-features section. Underscore-prefixed features are internal
# and excluded. Line counts are raw rustdoc item lines — see the
# summary block for the honest item taxonomy.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

## default features (13 lines)

pub mod zenutils_fuzz
pub struct zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite
impl zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite
pub fn zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite::new<P: core::convert::Into<std::path::PathBuf>>(P) -> Self
pub fn zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite::run(self)
pub fn zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite::target<F>(self, &str, F) -> Self where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&[u8]) + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static

impl core::marker::Send for zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite
impl core::marker::Sync for zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenutils_fuzz::RegressionSuite
